powers.name: Cleave
powers.description: Delivers a threefold attack to enemies in a cone before you, dealing physical damage each hit.

powers.name: Brazen Slash
powers.description: Delivers a threefold attack to target enemy, dealing physical damage each hit. Added Effect: Stamina Restoration.

powers.name: Weapon Master Strike
powers.description: Deal physical damage to target enemy.

powers.name: Tide of Iron
powers.description: Deal physical damage to target enemy. Added Effect: Your actions generate more threat. Duration: 10s.

powers.name: Threatening Rush
powers.description: Lunge at target enemy dealing physical damage. Added Effect: Increased Threat. Cannot be executed while rooted.

powers.name: Shield Bash
powers.description: Deal physical damage to enemies in a line before you.

powers.name: Guarded Strike
powers.description: Deal physical damage to target enemy.

powers.name: Bull Charge
powers.description: Lunge at target enemy dealing physical damage. Added Effect: Knock Back.

powers.name: Anvil of Doom
powers.description: Deal physical damage to target enemy. If the Vengeance Gauge is above 15, damage is enhanced, cooldown is reduced by 4s, and 15 vengeance is consumed.

powers.name: Enforced Threat
powers.description: Threaten nearby enemies, placing yourself at the top of their threat list. Reduces the awareness of all targets by 10%. Duration: 10s.

powers.name: Mighty Leap
powers.description: Leap to target area dealing physical damage to nearby enemies.

powers.name: Indomitable Battle Strike
powers.description: Deal heavy physical damage to target enemy.

powers.name: Not So Fast
powers.description: Deal physical damage to target enemy. Added Effect: Slow.

powers.name: Rising Tide
powers.description: Deal physical damage to target enemy.

powers.name: Retaliate
powers.description: Whenever you release Dig In immediately after blocking an attack, deal damage to enemies in a cone before you. Added Effect: Increased Threat. May only be triggered once every 10 seconds.

powers.name: Shield Throw
powers.description: Deal projectile damage to target enemy. Added Effect: Stun. Duration: 3s.

powers.name: Knee Breaker
powers.description: Deal physical damage to target enemy. Added Effect: Slow. Duration: 8s.

powers.name: Shield Slam
powers.description: Deal physical damage to enemies in a line before you. Added Effect: Knock Back.

powers.name: Linebreaker
powers.description: Lunge at target enemy dealing physical damage to enemies in a cone before you. Added Effect: Increased Threat.

powers.name: Knight's Valor
powers.description: Cover the nearest party member, intercepting all damage that would be dealt to them. All threat generated by the covered target is transferred to you. Duration: 10s.

powers.name: Knight's Challenge
powers.description: Instantly restore 50% of your stamina. Deal physical damage to attackers whenever you block. Duration: 8s.

powers.name: Iron Warrior
powers.description: Decreases damage taken by 20%. Duration: 8s.

powers.name: Crescendo
powers.description: Delivers a threefold attack to target enemy, dealing physical damage each hit.

powers.name: Explosive Defense
powers.description: Deal physical damage to nearby enemies.

powers.name: Second Wind
powers.description: Increases your maximum hit points by 20%, restore the amount increased, and recover a portion of damage dealt by most attacks as hit points. Duration: 10s.

powers.name: Earthshaker
powers.description: Deal physical damage to nearby enemies. Added Effect: Stun. Duration: 3s.

powers.name: Determination
powers.description: Dispels and grants immunity to control effects, and increases damage dealt by 10%. Duration: 10s.

powers.name: Bladed Rampart
powers.description: Adds 30% defense and deal physical damage to attackers whenever you take damage. Duration: 10s.

powers.name: Phalanx
powers.description: Gain immunity to most control effects and erect a barrier decreasing the damage taken by allies within by 20%. Duration: 14s. Effect ends early upon guarding.

powers.name: Wicked Strike
powers.description: Lunge at target enemy dealing physical damage to the target and nearby enemies.

powers.name: Sure Strike
powers.description: Delivers a fourfold attack to target enemy, dealing physical damage each hit.

powers.name: Frenzy
powers.description: Deal physical damage to target enemy in a furious series of strikes.

powers.name: Bloodletter
powers.description: Deal physical damage to target enemy. Absorbs damage dealt as hit points.

powers.name: Punishing Charge
powers.description: Lunge at target enemy dealing physical damage. Stun 3s.

powers.name: Avalanche of Steel
powers.description: Leap into the air avoiding most damage and control effects for 5 seconds before slamming down. Knockdown.

powers.name: Indomitable Battle Strike
powers.description: Deal heavy physical damage to target enemy.

powers.name: Valorous Strike
powers.description: Delivers a threefold attack to target enemy, dealing radiant damage each hit.

powers.name: Shielding Strike
powers.description: Delivers a threefold attack to target enemy, dealing radiant damage each hit. Stamina Restoration.

powers.name: Smite
powers.description: Deal radiant damage to target enemy. Magnitude decreases as remaining divinity decreases.

powers.name: Burning Light
powers.description: Deal radiant damage to all nearby enemies. Magnitude increases when fully charged. Stun 3s.

powers.name: Bane
powers.description: Deal radiant damage to enemies at the target location.

powers.name: Divine Judgment
powers.description: Deal radiant damage to target enemy.

powers.name: Lance of Faith
powers.description: Delivers a threefold attack dealing radiant damage. Increases Burning Judgement. Radiant Judgement increases magnitude.

powers.name: Sacred Flame
powers.description: Delivers a threefold attack dealing fire damage. Increases Radiant Judgement. Burning Judgement increases magnitude.

powers.name: Daunting Light
powers.description: Deal radiant damage to enemies at the target location. Increases Burning Judgement. Radiant Judgement increases magnitude.

powers.name: Break the Spirit
powers.description: Deal radiant damage. Increases target's damage taken from magical and projectile attacks by 10% for 10s.

powers.name: Chains of Blazing Light
powers.description: Restrain enemies at the target location for 12s.

powers.name: Prophecy of Doom
powers.description: Predict the target's demise. Over 10 seconds, 30% of most damage you deal to the target is stored and dealt at the end.

powers.name: Forgemaster's Flame
powers.description: Deal fire damage to target enemy. Increases Radiant Judgement. Burning Judgement increases magnitude.

powers.name: Flame Strike
powers.description: Deal fire damage to enemies at target location. Ignites the ground dealing fire damage to enemies who enter.

powers.name: Scattering Light
powers.description: Deal radiant damage to target and enemies near it. Increases Burning Judgement. Radiant Judgement increases magnitude.

powers.name: Magic Missile
powers.description: Blast your enemy with arcane damage. The third cast strikes 3 times. Adds a stack of Arcane Mastery.

powers.name: Ray of Frost
powers.description: Channel a powerful beam of frost at your target. Adds a chill stack with each hit. Freezes the target at 6 chill stacks.

powers.name: Scorching Burst
powers.description: Unleash a column of fire at your target. Size and damage increase the longer it is channeled. Adds Smolder to targets.

powers.name: Chilling Cloud
powers.description: Attack your enemy with a swarm of ice crystals. The third hit also damages enemies near your target. Grants chill stacks.

powers.name: Storm Pillar
powers.description: Charge up a blast of lightning to strike your enemy and nearby enemies. At max charge, spawns a pillar of lightning attacking nearby targets.

powers.name: Arcane Bolt
powers.description: Summon Arcane Bolts from the sky. Grants a stack of Arcane Mastery.

powers.name: Entangling Force
powers.description: Pull your enemy into the air and choke them. Hold 2s. Arcane Mastery increases duration by 0.1s per stack.

powers.name: Repel
powers.description: Send a forceful blast pushing your target away at high speed. Distance increased by Arcane Mastery stacks. Spell Mastery: Affects multiple targets.

powers.name: Ray of Enfeeblement
powers.description: Deal damage over time. Decreases target's outgoing damage by 10% for 10s. Spell Mastery: Target takes 10% more magical and projectile damage.

powers.name: Icy Terrain
powers.description: Freeze the ground around you. Roots targets for 1.5s. Adds Chill to enemies on the ice. Spell Mastery: Can cast at target location.

powers.name: Shield
powers.description: Form a shield equal to 30% of max HP. When depleted or recast, explodes outward with a push. Spell Mastery: Increased damage and push.

powers.name: Fanning the Flame
powers.description: Set your enemy ablaze with a hard to extinguish burn. Adds Smolder. Nearby Smoldered enemies take and deal damage to the burning target.

powers.name: Icy Rays
powers.description: First cast puts a rune mark on target. Second cast fires at both targets. Effectiveness increased if both beams hit one target. Stun 1s. Adds Chill.

powers.name: Chill Strike
powers.description: Hurl a powerful icicle at your enemy. Stun 0.5s. Adds Chill. Spell Mastery: Reduced damage but also damages nearby enemies.

powers.name: Conduit of Ice
powers.description: Turn an enemy into a conduit for an icy storm, dealing damage to them and nearby enemies. Adds Chill to all targets hit.

powers.name: Fireball
powers.description: Deal fire damage to target and nearby enemies. Adds Smolder. Spell Mastery: Becomes single target with increased magnitude.

powers.name: Lightning Bolt
powers.description: Call down the Spell Storm, releasing powerful bolts of lightning in front of you. Refreshes Arcane Mastery and Chill stacks.

powers.name: Disintegrate
powers.description: Deal arcane damage to your enemy. If the target is below 20% life, damage is increased by 50%.

powers.name: Steal Time
powers.description: Steal time from enemies around you, then shatter it to stun them. Slow 4s. Stun 1s. Arcane Mastery increases durations.

powers.name: Arcane Tempest
powers.description: Summon a fury of arcane energy at your target, damaging all enemies in range. Knockdown. Spell Mastery: Summons around yourself with increased magnitude.

powers.name: Arcane Conduit
powers.description: Enemy becomes a conduit for arcane energy. Target takes 15% increased arcane damage for 5s. Grants Arcane Mastery. Spell Mastery: Bonus increased to 20%.

powers.name: Imprisonment
powers.description: Imprison your target in arcane energy. Target takes increased damage from arcane powers. Spell Mastery: Increased arcane damage bonus.

powers.name: Shard of the Endless Avalanche
powers.description: Summon a shard of ice at the target location. Spell Mastery: Launches the shard toward a target location.

powers.name: Arcane Singularity
powers.description: Create a powerful singularity that sucks in all enemies in a large area. Gain a stack of Arcane Mastery.

powers.name: Ice Knife
powers.description: Summon and slam down a huge blade of ice into your enemy. Knockdown 1.5s. Adds 3 stacks of Chill.

powers.name: Oppressive Force
powers.description: Create an oppressive magnetic force that explodes after brief delay. Daze 1s. Grants Arcane Mastery. Repel on explosion.

powers.name: Furious Immolation
powers.description: Summon a titanic column of flame that draws enemies toward its center and blasts them upwards. Pull 1s. Adds Smolder.

powers.name: Ice Storm
powers.description: Unleash a massive wave of ice. Slow 5s. Knockdown. Adds 1 stack of Chill.

powers.name: Maelstrom of Chaos
powers.description: Unleash a bolt of spell storm chaos. Immune to control while casting. Knockdown 1s. Refreshes Arcane Mastery and Chill stacks.

powers.name: Arcane Empowerment
powers.description: Empower yourself with arcane magic. Encounter powers deal 10% more damage and recharge faster for 10s. Gain 5 stacks of Arcane Mastery.

powers.name: Eldritch Blast
powers.description: Delivers a threefold attack to target enemy, dealing necrotic damage each hit. The third attack also damages nearby enemies.

powers.name: Hellish Rebuke
powers.description: A fiery rebuke that deals damage and ignites your target with hellfire. Generates Soul Sparks over time. Targets that attack you take additional damage.

powers.name: Arms of Hadar
powers.description: Deal necrotic damage to all enemies in a path before you. Cooldown increases with each use, resetting after 15s. Knockdown.

powers.name: Blinding Light
powers.description: Blast your enemies with a burst of blinding radiant light.

powers.name: Fiery Bolt
powers.description: Fling a ball of Eldritch Flame that explodes upon hitting your target, dealing half damage to targets within 15 feet.

powers.name: Tyrannical Threat
powers.description: Place a devastating hex on your target causing necrotic damage. Target is damage linked, passing 15% of damage you deal to nearby targets for 20s.

powers.name: Sly Flourish
powers.description: A distracting flourish of swords that deals more damage with each successive strike.

powers.name: Cloud of Steel
powers.description: Toss blades at your target. Each strike increases all damage dealt to the target by 2.5%.

powers.name: Gloaming Cut
powers.description: Dash forward with a shadowy cross slash. Deals up to 100% more damage based on how much health the target is missing.

powers.name: Dazing Strike
powers.description: Snap into the air and deliver a crushing blow. Daze 4s. Stealthed: Attacks in a larger cone.

powers.name: Lashing Blade
powers.description: Focus your strength into one furious attack. Stealthed: +50% Critical Severity.

powers.name: Assassinate
powers.description: Quickly strike your target. 25% stronger from behind. Stealthed: 25% stronger from any direction.

powers.name: Disheartening Strike
powers.description: Fling a dagger with extreme precision. Target takes 5% more damage for 10s.

powers.name: Whirlwind of Blades
powers.description: Whip daggers around you. Damage increases by 3% per enemy hit, up to 5 enemies.

powers.name: Rapid Shot
powers.description: Quickly fire an arrow at your enemy.

powers.name: Careful Attack
powers.description: Study your target, signaling gaps in their defense to allies. Enemies studied are damaged when hit by At-Will, Encounter, or Daily powers.

powers.name: Longstrider's Shot
powers.description: Launch a swift arrow at your target.

powers.name: Cordon of Arrows
powers.description: Designate a target location. Enemies stepping within become entangled and take damage. Strong Grasping Roots. Max 3 active.

powers.name: Hindering Shot
powers.description: Fire two arrows into your enemy's shins. 3 charges with 3s between uses. Weak Grasping Roots.

powers.name: Storm of Blades
powers.description: Unleash a storm of blades around you, damaging nearby enemies.

powers.name: Reprise
powers.description: Delivers a fourfold attack to enemies in a cone before you, dealing physical damage each hit.

powers.name: Fleche
powers.description: Deal psychic damage to target enemy.

powers.name: Lunge
powers.description: Lunge at target enemy dealing physical damage. Stun 1s.

powers.name: Dancing Lights
powers.description: Deal psychic damage to target enemy. Daze 3s. Decreases target damage dealt by 5% for 6s.

powers.name: Flourish
powers.description: Increases the damage bonus or healing potency of your next encounter power or song by 50% for 9s.

powers.name: Duet
powers.description: Delivers a twofold attack to nearby enemies, dealing arcane damage each hit. Daze 2s.

powers.name: Delayed Play
powers.description: The next song you play will be stored rather than take effect immediately. Activate again to trigger the stored song instantly.

powers.name: Inspiration
powers.description: Grants you and the nearest party member immunity to most control effects, reduces damage taken by 15%, and increases damage bonus by 15% for 12s.

powers.name: Encore
powers.description: Activate the last song you played without depleting your Performance Gauge.

powers.name: Blaze Flamenco
powers.description: Deal fire damage to nearby enemies. Increases at-will and encounter magnitude by 20 and converts their damage type to fire for 36s.

powers.name: Rejuvenating Carol
powers.description: Apply a heal over time to self and all nearby allies for 30s.

powers.name: Con Elemento
powers.description: Deal fire damage to enemies in a radius around you. Changes form based on active song: Con Fuoco (Blaze Flamenco), Con Moto (Tailwind Mambo), Con Brio (Steel March).

powers.name: Con Fuoco
powers.description: Con Elemento under Blaze Flamenco. Deal fire damage to enemies in a radius around you at a higher magnitude.

powers.name: Con Moto
powers.description: Con Elemento under Tailwind Mambo. Deal projectile damage in a line before you.

powers.name: Con Brio
powers.description: Con Elemento under Steel March. Deal physical damage in a cone before you.

powers.name: Staccato
powers.description: Delivers a multi-hit attack to target enemy, dealing physical damage each hit.

powers.name: Phantasmal Concerto
powers.description: Channel to deal psychic damage to nearby enemies while moving at a reduced speed.

powers.name: Ad Libitum
powers.description: Deal physical damage to target enemy. 50% chance to allow immediate reuse, up to three times.

powers.name: Volti Subito
powers.description: Rush forward dealing physical damage to enemies in a path before you. May be executed twice more in rapid succession within 6s.

powers.name: Contre
powers.description: Raise your blade, absorbing 50% of frontal damage. Upon release, activate different attacks based on hold duration: Seconde, Septime, or Neuvieme.

powers.name: Bassline
powers.description: Channel to restore up to 200 performance while moving at a reduced speed. Cooldown reduced if cancelled early.

powers.name: Tailwind Mambo
powers.description: Deal projectile damage to enemies in a line before you. Increases at-will and encounter magnitude by 20 and converts damage to projectile for 72s.

powers.name: Steel March
powers.description: Deal physical damage to enemies in a cone. Increases at-will and encounter magnitude by 20 and converts damage to physical for 72s.

powers.name: Ballad of the Witch
powers.description: Your at-wills, encounters, and dailies deal additional arcane damage against all targets for 20s. Perform changes to Witch's Finale.

powers.name: Ballad of the Hero
powers.description: Your at-wills, encounters, and dailies deal additional radiant damage against the primary target for 20s. Perform changes to Hero's Finale.

powers.name: Lore
powers.description: Identify the target's weakness, increasing critical severity of attacks against it by 10% for 10s. Grants physical, magic, or projectile lore.

powers.name: Arpeggio
powers.description: Heal target ally or self.

powers.name: Serenade
powers.description: Tap to increase heal effectiveness on target by 5%. Hold and release to increase by an additional 50% for 10s.

powers.name: Defender's Minuet
powers.description: Instantly heal the nearby party member with the least hit points. Heals the Serenade target instead if there is one.

powers.name: Warding Carol
powers.description: Removes one negative condition from all nearby allies. Continually removes negative effects for 10s.

powers.name: Aurora Fantasia
powers.description: Your attacks deal additional psychic damage to all targets and heal nearby allies. Can be maintained indefinitely; Perform changes to Aurora Finale.

powers.name: Sheltering Etude
powers.description: Grants allies a shield that restores HP when health falls below 50% or upon expiration. Duration: 60s.

powers.name: Curtain Call
powers.description: Cancels all your song effects on nearby allies and grants added effects based on songs cancelled.

powers.name: Improvised Lunge
powers.description: Improvised version of Lunge, triggered by the Performer feat. Does not affect the cooldown of the actual power.

powers.name: Improvised Dancing Lights
powers.description: Improvised version of Dancing Lights, triggered by the Performer feat. Does not affect the cooldown of the actual power.

powers.name: Improvised Ad Libitum
powers.description: Improvised version of Ad Libitum, triggered by the Performer feat. Does not affect the cooldown of the actual power.

powers.name: Improvised Contre Seconde
powers.description: Improvised version of Contre Seconde, triggered by the Performer feat. Does not affect the cooldown of the actual power.

powers.name: Contre Seconde
powers.description: Immediate release variant of Contre. Deal physical damage to all enemies around you and knock them back.

powers.name: Hero's Finale
powers.description: Finale of Ballad of the Hero. Deals radiant damage to the target and ends the Ballad.

powers.name: Mystify
powers.description: Apply Mystify to a target, dealing psychic damage over time. When another player strikes the target, the effect ends dealing burst psychic damage and healing the striker.

feats.name: Skillful Infiltrator
feats.description: +3% Crit Severity, +3% Combat Advantage

feats.name: Bloody Brawler
feats.description: +5% melee damage

feats.name: Wilds Medicine
feats.description: +10% At-Will damage

feats.name: Exposed Weakness
feats.description: Encountering foes from Stealth: +10% damage for 6s

feats.name: Shadow of Demise
feats.description: Encounter powers apply a DoT equal to 50% of the hit over 6s (ticks every 1s)

feats.name: Knife's Edge
feats.description: After 4 At-Will hits, next Encounter deals +15% damage

feats.name: Duelist's Flurry Bonus
feats.description: Each At-Will hit has 15% chance to proc 80 magnitude bleed

feats.name: Heavy Slash
feats.description: +5% At-Will damage

feats.name: Combat Superiority
feats.description: +10% damage when you have Combat Advantage

feats.name: Executioner's Style
feats.description: +15% damage vs targets below 30% HP

feats.name: Steel Blitz
feats.description: 25% chance on At-Will hit to deal extra 100 magnitude

feats.name: Crushing Surge
feats.description: Encounter powers give a 6s buff: +8% damage

feats.name: Cleaving Bull
feats.description: Cleave and Bull Charge deal +50 magnitude when hitting multiple enemies

feats.name: Shieldthrower
feats.description: Shield Throw generates 300% more Threat

feats.name: Enforced Threat
feats.description: Enforced Threat reduces enemy Awareness by 10%

feats.name: Staying Power
feats.description: +5% Power, +5% Crit Strike. Enforced Threat generates +500% Threat

feats.name: Perfect Block
feats.description: Determination: blocked damage is reduced to 0 for 10s, gains 180s cooldown

feats.name: Sharpened Senses
feats.description: Bladed Rampart grants +30% Awareness while active

feats.name: Relative Haste
feats.description: Cooldown speed +1% per chill stack on target (max 10%)

feats.name: Smoldering Recovery
feats.description: Smolder damage grants 0.5% AP (1.5% with Directed Flames)

feats.name: Glowing Flames
feats.description: Smolder radiates 20% damage to enemies within 15'

feats.name: Icy Veins
feats.description: Encounter activation applies 1 chill stack to enemies within 15'

feats.name: Chilling Advantage
feats.description: Cold powers apply Rimefire Smolder (DoT: 200 mag over 18s, ticks every 3s) instead of Chill

feats.name: Shatter Strike
feats.description: 20% chance to shatter frozen targets for 250 mag, +150 mag vs control-immune

feats.name: Critical Burn
feats.description: +10% Crit Severity, Smolder +25% crit damage

feats.name: Frigid Winds
feats.description: +1.25% damage per chill stack on target

feats.name: Directed Flames
feats.description: Smolder deals 80% total upfront (no DoT), 12s cooldown

feats.name: Rimefire Weaving
feats.description: Smolder/Chill = -5% target DR, Rimefire = -10% DR

feats.name: Alacrity
feats.description: Daily vs enemy reduces Encounter cooldowns by 2s

feats.name: Spell Twisting
feats.description: Encounters build stacks; At-Will consumes 1 stack for +1% AP

feats.name: Assailing Force
feats.description: 10% chance on Encounter: next Encounter deals double initial damage

feats.name: Snap Freeze
feats.description: Chill deals 40 magnitude per stack applied

feats.name: Chaos Magic
feats.description: 5% chance on Encounter/Daily for random buff (Power Surge/Recovery/AP)

feats.name: Iced Lightning
feats.description: Lightning powers +10% vs chill targets

feats.name: Nightmare Wizardry
feats.description: Crits have 10% chance to grant Combat Advantage for 10s

feats.name: Striking Advantage
feats.description: CA damage: 25% chance for 100 mag lightning hit (1s CD)

feats.name: A Step Above Mastery
feats.description: Arcane Mastery: 10 stacks, +0.5% per stack, 10s duration

feats.name: Elemental Reinforcement
feats.description: Arcane/Cold/Lightning → +5% dmg 10s, doubled if varied elements

feats.name: Piercing Light
feats.description: +8% Radiant damage

feats.name: Righteous Wrath
feats.description: At-Will hits build +2% damage (max 5 stacks, 8s)

feats.name: Fire of the Gods
feats.description: Daily powers apply a DoT: 200 magnitude over 8s (Fire)

feats.name: Astral Fury
feats.description: +10% damage when AP is above 50%

feats.name: Twin-Blade Storm
feats.description: +5% damage for each nearby target (max 3 stacks)

feats.name: Blade Hurricane
feats.description: 20% chance on hit to proc 80 magnitude Physical hit

feats.name: Aspect of the Serpent
feats.description: +3% Power, +3% Crit Strike, +3% Combat Advantage

feats.name: Commanding Shot
feats.description: Encounter powers buff +6% damage for 8s

feats.name: Relentless Rage
feats.description: +5% At-Will damage, +5% Encounter damage

feats.name: Overpowering Surge
feats.description: Each consecutive At-Will +3% damage (max 5 stacks, resets on Encounter)

feats.name: Steel Slam
feats.description: Encounter powers have 30% chance to proc 150 magnitude

feats.name: Battle Awareness
feats.description: +5% Power, +5% Accuracy

feats.name: Radiant Weapon
feats.description: +8% Radiant damage

feats.name: Divine Action
feats.description: +15% AP Gain

feats.name: Aura of Courage
feats.description: Each hit procs 30 magnitude Radiant (always)

feats.name: Composure
feats.description: +5% Crit Severity, +5% Accuracy

feats.name: Dread Warrior
feats.description: Encounter powers buff +10% damage for 4s

feats.name: Soul Spark Recovery
feats.description: +8% At-Will damage

feats.name: Risky Investment
feats.description: +15% Encounter damage when AP below 200

feats.name: Dark Revelry
feats.description: Killing blows (simulated as Daily use) give +5% Power for 10s

feats.name: Soul Desecration
feats.description: Necrotic hits apply 100 magnitude DoT over 5s

feats.name: Creeping Death
feats.description: +5% damage for each DoT active (sim estimates +5% flat)

features.name: Invisible Infiltrator
features.description: +5% damage while Stealthed

features.name: Tactics
features.description: +10% AP gain from encounters

features.name: Sly Flourish
features.description: +5% At-Will damage

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.description: +5% damage when behind target (Combat Advantage)

features.name: Blade and Shadow
features.description: +3% Encounter damage, +3% At-Will damage

features.name: Oppressive Darkness
features.description: On Encounter use: proc 40 magnitude shadow hit

features.name: Steel Blitz
features.description: 10% chance on hit: extra 60 magnitude hit

features.name: Battle Awareness
features.description: +3% damage, +3% Critical Strike

features.name: Prepared Slam
features.description: +8% Encounter damage

features.name: Momentum
features.description: After 3 consecutive At-Will hits: +10% damage for next hit

features.name: Combat Superiority
features.description: +5% At-Will damage

features.name: Steel Defense
features.description: +5% Deflect Severity

features.name: Greater Endurance
features.description: +10% Movement Speed, +5% Stamina Regen

features.name: Vigorous Strikes
features.description: At-Will hits restore HP, +3% Incoming Healing

features.name: Steel Recovery
features.description: Blocking restores HP and Stamina over time

features.name: Anvil of Challenge
features.description: Anvil of Doom taunts for 8s, +200% Threat

features.name: Arcane Presence
features.description: Arcane Mastery also boosts Cold/Fire/Lightning by 0.5% per stack

features.name: Evocation
features.description: +10% AoE power damage

features.name: Chilling Presence
features.description: +0.5% damage per chill stack (doubled on frozen)

features.name: Orb of Imposition
features.description: +20% control power duration

features.name: Critical Conflagration
features.description: +10% Crit Severity, crits add Smolder

features.name: Swath of Destruction
features.description: Smolder +5% damage, targets with Smolder take +2%

features.name: Combustive Action
features.description: Smolder kill grants 1% max AP (1s CD)

features.name: Frost Wave
features.description: Daily activation: 3 chill stacks + Freeze foes within 30'

features.name: Eye of the Storm
features.description: Encounter/Daily use → +10% Crit Strike for 5s (20s cooldown)

features.name: Storm Spell
features.description: 20% chance on crit: 100 magnitude lightning

features.name: Storm Fury
features.description: When attacked: 50 mag lightning (3s per-enemy CD)

features.name: Arcane Power Field
features.description: Daily → 8s: double Arcane Mastery bonus + 50 mag/2s AoE

features.name: Arcane Mastery
features.description: Arcane spells build stacks (+0.5% Arcane damage each, max 5 stacks, 8s duration)

features.name: Chill
features.description: Cold spells add Chill: slow targets, max 6 stacks → Freeze (root 3s)

features.description: Tab slot: one Encounter power with boosted damage/effect

features.description: Control effects deal 2.5× effectiveness vs NPCs (Stun, Root, Hold, Daze)

features.name: Smolder
features.description: Fire powers apply Smolder DoT; if target has Chill → Rimefire Smolder
